info.title: Scrape Creators API
info.description: The easiest way to scrape public social media data at scale. Extract profiles, posts, videos, comments, and more from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit, and 15+ platforms.

get.description: Get the pins of a pinterest board

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the board to get

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: The cursor to get the next page of results

parameters.name: trim
parameters.description: Set to true for a trimmed down version of the response

pins.title: Crispy Air Fryer Pizza Rolls Recipe -
pins.unified_user_note: Craving a quick snack that combines cheesy goodness and crispy texture? These air fryer pizza rolls are the answer! Perfect for movie nights, parties, or just a casual treat, they pack all the flavor of your favorite pizza into a bite-sized delight. Imagine biting into a perfectly golden roll where melty cheese and zesty sauce meld together. The air fryer gives these pizza rolls a satisfying crunch without the extra oil, making them a healthier option that doesn’t skimp on taste.
pins.alt_text: Crispy air fryer pizza rolls served with marinara sauce for dipping on a plate.

pins.description: Craving a quick snack that combines cheesy goodness and crispy texture? These air fryer pizza rolls are the answer! Perfect for movie nights, parties, or just a casual treat, they pack all the flavor of your favorite pizza into a bite-sized delight. Imagine biting into a perfectly golden roll where melty cheese and zesty sauce meld together. The air fryer gives these pizza rolls a satisfying crunch without the extra oil, making them a healthier option that doesn’t skimp on taste.
